entities.name: WATER AND LAND MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Improvements in the management of water and land resources to increase productivity

entities.name: WATER PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: Getting more value or benefit from the volume of water used to produce agricultural outputs

entities.description: The practice of farming, including crops, fish, forests, and livestock

entities.name: FISH
entities.description: Aquatic animals produced as part of agricultural productivity

entities.name: FORESTS
entities.description: Land covered with trees, managed for productivity

entities.name: LIVESTOCK
entities.description: Domesticated animals raised in an agricultural setting

entities.name: WATER SCARCITY
entities.description: The lack of sufficient available water resources to meet demands

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A continent emphasized in the study for improving water productivity

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: A region emphasized in the study for improving water productivity
